_comment: Personal expiry & deadline reminders, checked once a day. Each entry: name (what it is), date (YYYY-MM-DD), optional lead_days (how many days before to remind; default [90, 30, 7, 1, 0]), optional recurring ('yearly' for birthdays/anniversaries so the same date repeats every year), optional note (extra line in the push). A reminder fires once per lead day, so a single deadline produces a gentle 90-day heads-up tapering to a day-of nudge. Edit this file directly on github.com; no code change needed.

reminders.name: EXAMPLE - delete me: passport renewal
reminders.note: Replace this example with your real documents, subscriptions, and dates.
